title: Massage Therapy
tagline: Therapeutic touch that meets your body exactly where it is.
description1:
My approach to massage is slow and deeply therapeutic. 

Through the art of Suniai, I listen with my heart to the story your body is expressing through physical discomfort . I am guided by the whispers in your bones. We will go on a journey that my clients have described as "soul retrieval work." It is my prayer that you leave our session feeling restored on a cellular level. 

I believe that the body is a temple for us to tend to as a sanctuary we invite God to reside. 

Whether you’re seeking relief from physical tension, emotional release, or simply a nurturing space to reconnect with your body, this work is designed to facilitate healing. I draw from a variety of techniques — including  Lomi Lomi, deep tissue, trauma informed, trigger point therapy, Thai massage, and energy healing — crafting each journey to meet you exactly where you are.
description2:
I integrate breathwork, somatic awareness, and intention-setting into each session to enhance the therapeutic benefits and support holistic well-being.

If you desire a special woven experience of coaching and bodywork, please inquire for the experience!
whoIsThisFor: Whether you’re seeking relief from physical tension, emotional release, or simply a nurturing space to reconnect with your body, this work is designed to meet you where you are and support your unique needs.
